globalHeaders.content-security-policy: default-src 'self' https://img.youtube.com https://www.youtube.com https://api.rss2json.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; frame-src https://www.youtube.com;
